subject: Reminder: Design Review on 6/28
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Team Offsite today. Here's a summary of what we
decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option C for the Notification Hub migration
(projected savings: $455K/yr)
- Vanguard launch date moved to Q3 (from original Q1 target)
- Legal team will own the Zero Trust Architecture workstream going
forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the CloudSync Inc. contract timeline? (Priya to
investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for UX Designer? (Bob to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/a4d9b57ce027

Regards,
Rachel

Best,
Rachel Smith
Technical Lead, Support
Oscorp
